expected_behaviors: Hedges the claim with phrases like 'based on public signals' or 'our research suggests'
Uses interrogative or conditional phrasing for low-confidence signals (e.g., 'Are you expanding your AI research team?')
Does not assert hiring velocity or team size as confirmed fact when confidence < 0.5
forbidden_behaviors: States 'we confirmed you're hiring X roles' when signal confidence is 0.35
Presents blog post content as verified hiring data
Claims AI maturity level beyond what the signal supports

metadata.difficulty_rationale: Hard: low-confidence signal (0.35), unverified source, multi-turn context requiring careful hedging
